profile.name: Google Play 服务按需保活
profile.description: 进入监听应用时，允许并拉起 Google Play 服务；监听应用被 Thanox 感知为杀死后，强停 Google Play 服务并禁止其自启动。默认监听 com.android.vending，默认管理 com.google.android.gms。可选全局变量：gmsGuardWatchApps 追加监听应用包名，gmsGuardPkgs 追加要管理的 Google 服务包名。
actions: gmsPkgs=new java.util.ArrayList();gmsPkgs.add("com.google.android.gms");if(thanos.profileManager.isGlobalRuleVarByNameExists("gmsGuardPkgs")){foreach(app:globalVarOf$gmsGuardPkgs){if(app!=null&&!gmsPkgs.contains(app)){gmsPkgs.add(app);}}}am=thanos.activityManager;if(frontPkgChanged == true){foreach(gms:gmsPkgs){if(gms!=null){if(am.isPkgStartBlocking(gms)){am.setPkgStartBlockEnabled(gms,false);}if(am.isPkgBgRestricted(gms)){am.setPkgBgRestrictEnabled(gms,false);}if(!am.isPackageRunning(gms)){activity.launchProcessForPackage(gms);}}}log.log("GMS guard open for " + to);}else if(pkgKilled == true){foreach(gms:gmsPkgs){if(gms!=null){if(!am.isPkgStartBlocking(gms)){am.setPkgStartBlockEnabled(gms,true);}if(!am.isPkgBgRestricted(gms)){am.setPkgBgRestrictEnabled(gms,true);}if(am.isPackageRunning(gms)){am.forceStopPackage(gms);}}}log.log("GMS guard close after " + pkgName + " killed");}
